rows.label: tev016201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev016201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Gigio about Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev016201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev016201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gigio about recent developments.

rows.label: tev016201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Gigio about his work as an Arms.

rows.label: tev016201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Gigio about recent developments.

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0001
rows.name:
I sensed the presence of a strange
lifeform when I was sleeping at
a camp in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0002
rows.name:
I wanted to observe it longer, so I pretended
I was asleep in my tent. But then I heard
a voice speaking softly in English.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0003
rows.name:
The only words I could make out were "meat,"
"unappetizing," "wallet," and "steal."
...Which is weird, right? Really weird.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Anyway, I freaked out and yelled at everyone to prepare
for combat, which made the creature run off into the
brush. I still have no idea what the hell it was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I've accepted another
weapon-testing job from Isobe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0011
rows.name:
The weapon is incredibly
powerful, but easy to use and
quite practical for fieldwork![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0012
rows.name:
It's really an excellent piece. I
feel like I'm the luckiest Arms in
BLADE for getting to test it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'd hate to miss another opportunity
to accept a mission from a great
weapons developer like Isobe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0014
rows.name:
So I've got to make sure I select
jobs that won't leave me repeating
my failure in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now in addition to Sakuraba, Grenada, and MEREDES,
we have the Nopon Commerce Guild and Candid &
Credible—two xenoform arms manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0021
rows.name:
I wonder if they'll all want us to
conduct prototype weapon tests like
the kind you helped with earlier?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0022
rows.name:
If so, that won't be easy. That's an awful
lot of companies to serve, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Recently, we had a mission to
escort merchants from the Nopon
Commerce Guild to White Woods. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0024
rows.name:
But as soon as the little buggers saw anything of value,
they ditched their escorts and went running after it.
Which made it really hard to actually PROTECT them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Jajanni from Candid & Credible entrusted
me with a new prototype weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0031
rows.name:
That thing is no joke. I took down a
rampaging simius in a single shot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'd heard about the technological
prowess of the Ma-non, but firing
that gun let me really feel it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Whether it's Jajanni or Isobe from
Sakuraba, this city is lucky to have
access to such truly gifted inventors.[ST:wait ]
